parameters.query:
SELECT 
  l.id AS lead_id,
  l.first_name,
  l.last_name,
  l.email AS lead_email,
  l.phone AS lead_phone,
  l.lead_score,
  l.lead_tier,
  l.budget,
  l.province,
  l.timeline,
  l.status AS lead_status,
  l.submitted_at,
  l.last_contact_at,
  l.property_title AS interested_property,
  l.property_url AS interested_property_url,
  a.name AS agent_name,
  a.email AS agent_email,
  a.phone AS agent_phone,
  fr.id AS reminder_id,
  fr.reminder_type,
  fr.due_date,
  fr.note AS reminder_note,
  EXTRACT(DAYS FROM NOW() - l.last_contact_at) AS days_since_contact,
  EXTRACT(DAYS FROM NOW() - l.submitted_at) AS days_since_submission
FROM leads l
JOIN agents a ON a.id = l.agent_id
LEFT JOIN follow_up_reminders fr ON fr.lead_id = l.id 
  AND fr.completed = false 
  AND fr.due_date <= CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day'
WHERE l.status NOT IN ('converted', 'lost', 'unsubscribed')
AND (
  -- Scheduled reminder due
  fr.id IS NOT NULL
  OR
  -- Hot lead with no contact in 1 day
  (l.lead_tier = 'hot' AND l.last_contact_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day')
  OR
  -- Warm lead with no contact in 3 days  
  (l.lead_tier = 'warm' AND l.last_contact_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '3 days')
  OR
  -- Cold lead with no contact in 7 days
  (l.lead_tier = 'cold' AND l.last_contact_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days')
  OR
  -- New lead (within 24h) with no contact yet
  (l.submitted_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND l.last_contact_at IS NULL)
)
ORDER BY 
  CASE l.lead_tier WHEN 'hot' THEN 1 WHEN 'warm' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END,
  fr.due_date ASC NULLS LAST,
  l.last_contact_at ASC;

-- Mark scheduled reminders as sent
UPDATE follow_up_reminders
SET notified_at = NOW()
WHERE lead_id IN (
  SELECT id FROM leads
  WHERE status NOT IN ('converted', 'lost', 'unsubscribed')
)
AND completed = false
AND due_date <= CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day'
AND notified_at IS NULL;
